Closes #

## 🔗 Requirement Traceability

<!-- Every code PR should trace back to at least one requirement -->

| Requirement ID | Title | AC Covered |
|---|---|---|
| `BR/UR/FR/NFR-XXX` | | AC-X, AC-X |

---

## 🏷 Type of Change

- [ ] ✨ `feat` — New feature (user story)
- [ ] 🐛 `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] 🏗 `infra` — Infrastructure / Terraform change
- [ ] 📄 `docs` — Documentation only
- [ ] ♻️ `refactor` — Code restructure, no behaviour change
- [ ] 🧪 `test` — Tests added or updated
- [ ] 🔧 `chore` — Config, CI/CD, dependencies

---

## 🧪 Testing

- [ ] Unit tests added or updated
- [ ] Integration tests added or updated
- [ ] Manually tested locally via `docker compose up`
- [ ] No testing required (docs / config only)

---

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] Code follows layered architecture: `controller → service → repository`
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or `.env` values committed
- [ ] Terraform changes validated with `terraform plan`
- [ ] Angular feature module structure maintained (`src/app/features/`)
- [ ] Documentation updated if behaviour changed
- [ ] PR title uses conventional commits: `feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, `infra:`, `test:`

---

## 📸 Screenshots (Frontend changes only)
